_config.description: Global configuration for application metadata and URLs with domain-based provider filtering. The 'domainBasedProviders' object maps email domains to arrays of allowed providers (first is default), and 'defaultProviders' is used for unmapped domains.

ollama.label: Ollama (Local)
ollama.helpText: Install Ollama locally - no API key needed

onsite1.label: onsite1
onsite1.helpText: Contact your system administrator for API key and configuration details
